description: Gemfile.lock is missing or ignored for an application, so machines resolve different gems and prod runs untested versions.
body: Failure mode: an application does not commit Gemfile.lock (or deploy runs bundle update), so each environment resolves the Gemfile independently and runs different transitive gem versions than were tested. Detection signals: Gemfile.lock absent or gitignored for an app; deploy invokes bundle update; a bug reproduces on one machine only. Do not resolve gem versions at deploy time for an application. Safer fallback: commit Gemfile.lock, run bundle install (which honors the lock) everywhere or bundle install --deployment in CI, and reserve bundle update for a reviewed, tested bump. A reusable gem library legitimately omits the lock so consumers resolve fresh.
